text: All comparables have been found in the subject's neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of zero lot lines of a similar location, design, age, quality, condition, GLA, room count, and basement finish. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a 6.7% market time adjustment based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its lack of a walkout basement, lack of a patio, and lack of a fireplace. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its quality, lack of a walkout basement, basement finished room count, garage space count, and lack of a fireplace. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its inferior condition and basement finished room count.
